gauge.name: Rockfish Creek near Raeford

impacts.statement: Major Flood Stage. The creek reaches the road surface on the bridge over Hwy 401. Bridge will be closed to traffic.
Moderate Flood Stage. The creek reaches the bridge trusses on the bridge over Hwy 401.
Minor Flood Stage. The creek spills over the natural bank and retaining embankment at the bridge over Hwy 401.
Action Stage. The creek is approaching bankfull.

dataAttribution.text: USGS--Water Resources of the United States
dataAttribution.title: US Geological Survey
Observations courtesy of U.S. Geological Survey

gauge.forecastReliability: Forecasts are not available. Only observed stages are available for this point.
